```{=html}
<div>                        <script>window.PlotlyConfig = {MathJaxConfig: 'local'};</script>
        <script charset="utf-8" src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-3.5.0.min.js" integrity="sha256-fHbNLP+GlIXN+efbQec78UkemUz3NJp7UmfGxC1tNxs=" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>                <div id="fig6-counterfactual" class="plotly-graph-div" style="height:380px; width:100%;"></div>            <script>                window.PLOTLYENV=window.PLOTLYENV || {};                                if (document.getElementById("fig6-counterfactual")) {                    Plotly.newPlot(                        "fig6-counterfactual",                        [{"hovertemplate":"Effect: %{x:.2f}\u003cbr\u003eFirms: %{y}\u003cextra\u003e\u003c\u002fextra\u003e","marker":{"color":"#3B82F6"},"name":"Per-firm effect","opacity":0.9,"x":{"dtype":"f8","bdata":"0DV01Sod6D9Ut7hK+driP\u002fxwpsdPqOs\u002fOA0g3HFM7T8wGehAnY3jP7Tn0xc2n+s\u002fiD\u002fdY6mb7T+sUFAmHpnrP1Rh8FVgUu0\u002f6NDbSuzT6j9o8wMYvubjP3BPZsSP4ek\u002fyPgZIIQl6z80LZlDf5DpP9A1dNUqHeg\u002fUJPN+phA6z9kyVOqkUjsPzydNt2TY+w\u002foAZDNYpD6D8QsDbcVe7tP\u002fRXRw7wyeg\u002fcE9mxI\u002fh6T94MIyNTR\u002ftP6Tx81TfzOs\u002f+N7KSybh6T8QsDbcVe7tP2DSbgl5POs\u002foKcs6cwn4j9Q\u002fgUnmvXgP3joRZbn2Ok\u002fmFHf0OjQ6j+UwFVGdY7sP7i+sEM9HOI\u002fZMlTqpFI7D9EDcEWps7lP8ApETSIae0\u002f6I3zYvlc6j\u002f4k+D2L\u002fbrP1jsxZrJJeQ\u002faOUMPdgl7D8YkbSOrWnmP7ikL6KJ8O0\u002f9Hsks7Jz6z94pKENoiztP4jHp4c4Veo\u002f9E6z2Q5e6z\u002fQ0ewgZTvtP5wGpSP\u002fFeE\u002fkJX4LHWt5z94kLmDkfvrP+iN82L5XOo\u002f8Is95amr4z+gvHj6uu7tP+wNMLVV0+s\u002f1Dyt\u002fKLl6z9YiSdPyvTtP6C8ePq67u0\u002fNLnTyylN7T9gXr3in7HnP1jP6siWPOs\u002fLD+219PK6z9YiSdPyvTtPxiRtI6taeY\u002faOUMPdgl7D8cm\u002fbPicbsPwCWcBCKbeo\u002foAeUHOTT6D\u002fUPK38ouXrP\u002fROs9kOXus\u002fWOvvuw1L7D+MxHY\u002fEcrsP9DR7CBlO+0\u002f3EBGu\u002fbD5T+od4NeDAjnP3ikoQ2iLO0\u002fBIIpYote5j\u002fwpecXciHtP\u002fQCoRsJjuw\u002fAJoSXa8i6T8s1ZyB\u002fWvlP0ju9UCaI+M\u002fwHVkykFk7D+MokBk65XZP5T9lrCDdew\u002f4C43utMi7j+MJy7CEmjqP5TAVUZ1juw\u002foAeUHOTT6D9g0m4JeTzrPxyb9s+Jxuw\u002fWMJfYhEt6D84DSDccUztP9SUPAWuyeo\u002fdFkPl4t95D80yAj6ReDsP7Tn0xc2n+s\u002fcNTt0\u002fFd6T\u002fcXVeFQKPoPzgNINxxTO0\u002fxL74Mjjz6z+YNZRKFOfqP7wOh042uOs\u002f8Is95amr4z9gXr3in7HnP3iQuYOR++s\u002feDCMjU0f7T+wAuLNxt7tP8ApETSIae0\u002f3EBGu\u002fbD5T+sO\u002fgMzDXrPwSBx3Kmuto\u002foDSwlX\u002fF5D\u002fcXVeFQKPoP5hR39Do0Oo\u002f2IPmWWuT6T\u002fQdnwZOMDoP6w7+AzMNes\u002fbK01gTjN5T88sBIhORLnP0SFMEcB5+s\u002f5EshTGxy5j+MxHY\u002fEcrsPwRmokTB2+A\u002f0DV01Sod6D8QEujhw8roP6RISOvNi+Q\u002f3Dfc5sYj5T8Qq3PxBjroPzgNINxxTO0\u002f3IOskjDx2z94MIyNTR\u002ftP\u002fi3iW60+Os\u002fWBXbGAB73T\u002fohiWJZZfpPxxRylj5Z+Y\u002fEKtz8QY66D94kLmDkfvrP3BPZsSP4ek\u002fXLWObDz36z+QlBrhPVXpP5TAVUZ1juw\u002fYF694p+x5z\u002fkawT9Rl7kP6isyegMuuE\u002feHRC9IU85j9kyVOqkUjsP1jP6siWPOs\u002fgHyo9vhI7D8g\u002fI6RuynaP6C8ePq67u0\u002f7I3B1XKs6j9w1O3T8V3pP6isyegMuuE\u002ftOfTFzaf6z+oSkLSA5LnP1Drptqg6sw\u002f2IPmWWuT6T\u002f0V0cO8MnoPzTICPpF4Ow\u002f+LeJbrT46z8stTq3OY\u002fmP2Ajw2EAwuA\u002f9AKhGwmO7D\u002fIZUWhnMDtP0ju9UCaI+M\u002f7FMg9bGy5T8QgqX7+zHsP6CAL5jwAt4\u002fdOSKb+uk1D+IKQDldu\u002ftP\u002fBiAGOJP+M\u002fmFbvzk\u002fd7T+8eBi3mzDoP8znquBj0eM\u002f6CyK0cer5z+MokBk65XZPywfhjolZ+A\u002fgLuctCZV7T9Q\u002fgUnmvXgP9DqJ7JKvOs\u002f0I\u002f5\u002fNcq6z9UYfBVYFLtP8AcpvQ\u002fmOA\u002fYF694p+x5z\u002fIZUWhnMDtPzCH7dyTeuw\u002fcE9mxI\u002fh6T\u002f4t4lutPjrP\u002fi3iW60+Os\u002fMM3yLZwc5T88sBIhORLnPwSK4kKxNOM\u002fHKoAfFco7T8UTnUFss\u002fkP3j2OzUM\u002fuk\u002f1JQ8Ba7J6j94kLmDkfvrPxAS6OHDyug\u002fdIqv2NEa1D8EqmqlIvvsP\u002fi3iW60+Os\u002fsFPVdeb96j9st7X8WRjjP5TAVUZ1juw\u002fWM\u002fqyJY86z9w1O3T8V3pP4zEdj8Ryuw\u002fkNCV40Zc6j+oLs7bsgrhP\u002fxwpsdPqOs\u002f0NbxmVBd7D8EqmqlIvvsP1Rh8FVgUu0\u002feJC5g5H76z9YenEVuxzuP4REyDK3Q+w\u002fxI6cw3Fp4j\u002fAKRE0iGntP6w7+AzMNes\u002fiCkA5Xbv7T844HlZ6qjnP+wNMLVV0+s\u002fNC2ZQ3+Q6T\u002f4tHlYmKPnP0TADg1L+Ow\u002feOhFlufY6T9wT2bEj+HpP1Rh8FVgUu0\u002fgLuctCZV7T8EZqJEwdvgP6AlhJA2D+U\u002fiMenhzhV6j\u002f008Au1DztP1y1jmw89+s\u002fgLuctCZV7T+MxHY\u002fEcrsP\u002fCl5xdyIe0\u002fqKwMZvP34j8w51vv1ybdP9SdXNfXQ+I\u002fEKtz8QY66D\u002f4tHlYmKPnP5CV+Cx1rec\u002foLx4+rru7T\u002fUmPmCA3vpP6xQUCYemes\u002fgL62X2wQ6z94pKENoiztP8Cd3BqWsug\u002fKBQ7DNjv3j\u002fw0F2O2hneP1S3uEr52uI\u002fcNTt0\u002fFd6T\u002fsDTC1VdPrP\u002fSaIlnBM+Q\u002fdBFrOO1l7T9EMqLHHYjrP3BPZsSP4ek\u002f0Lnr313F4T+IKQDldu\u002ftP9DR7CBlO+0\u002f1E+LLH4n5T+YM1cNwpjtP6h3g14MCOc\u002fzOeq4GPR4z9EWbCCCPDoP9SsspalS+g\u002fZMlTqpFI7D\u002f0V0cO8MnoP\u002fDQXY7aGd4\u002fmFHf0OjQ6j9gPrTUMv\u002fmPxTjRLmjk+w\u002foAeUHOTT6D+kLO6wcWXrP9xdV4VAo+g\u002fiCkA5Xbv7T+8DodONrjrP2ytNYE4zeU\u002fHJv2z4nG7D90WQ+Xi33kP+QlTSXzmuk\u002fyPhlnkHm6D94dEL0hTzmP8j4GSCEJes\u002fSO71QJoj4z+wAuLNxt7tP5AdG\u002fCuseo\u002frFBQJh6Z6z\u002fY5FY9o5jmPwCWcBCKbeo\u002f7JuDQYgm6D9EwA4NS\u002fjsPxyqAHxXKO0\u002fhETIMrdD7D\u002f008Au1DztPzA2j30pP+Q\u002fXLWObDz36z\u002fcQEa79sPlP\u002fCl5xdyIe0\u002fEMZIZK4M7j+sdpZSWyHpP2BeveKfsec\u002foAeUHOTT6D80udPLKU3tPzAZ6ECdjeM\u002f9AKhGwmO7D8cm\u002fbPicbsPzgNINxxTO0\u002feJC5g5H76z+cBqUj\u002fxXhP5CP1PhBiuw\u002fhETIMrdD7D\u002fEWjyogHLkPyDgVN4Y\u002fus\u002fNC2ZQ3+Q6T\u002fQuevfXcXhP\u002fTTwC7UPO0\u002fiGChdBLD5T+kLO6wcWXrP8B1ZMpBZOw\u002f1JQ8Ba7J6j9o09oVG5PtP1Rh8FVgUu0\u002fGLXFTveQ5z\u002fo0NtK7NPqP4DYkFHhveU\u002fzOeq4GPR4z\u002f0TrPZDl7rP0TADg1L+Ow\u002fbIhz2sHu5j\u002fM56rgY9HjP1jr77sNS+w\u002f+LeJbrT46z+Qlfgsda3nP8hlRaGcwO0\u002f1Dyt\u002fKLl6z94MIyNTR\u002ftP2TJU6qRSOw\u002fcE9mxI\u002fh6T9YKaFTO+XsP3iQuYOR++s\u002fAJNySiiL3j8wh+3ck3rsP9iD5llrk+k\u002fXLWObDz36z+ERMgyt0PsP4C7nLQmVe0\u002fjMR2PxHK7D\u002f0AqEbCY7sP3hK4bOeh+c\u002fHF5+tvic4T+sUFAmHpnrP9DR7CBlO+0\u002fRMAODUv47D9EwA4NS\u002fjsP3hK4bOeh+c\u002fwHVkykFk7D9srTWBOM3lP6AHFMnZ3N8\u002f0Lnr313F4T8A2AeGaV3pP7x4GLebMOg\u002f9FdHDvDJ6D+059MXNp\u002frP5CUGuE9Vek\u002fEBLo4cPK6D\u002fwpecXciHtP1jr77sNS+w\u002foAeUHOTT6D8QEujhw8roP5hR39Do0Oo\u002fkI\u002fU+EGK7D9Ut7hK+driP6AGQzWKQ+g\u002f6I3zYvlc6j\u002fcQEa79sPlP7ikL6KJ8O0\u002fOA0g3HFM7T\u002f4tlXERxLqP9B2fBk4wOg\u002fmFHf0OjQ6j\u002fsDTC1VdPrP4QsVlSNC+o\u002fqGsJGADv6j+Qj9T4QYrsP5A9rt+6Ldg\u002f6NDbSuzT6j9M07mVXzXoP5CUGuE9Vek\u002f1JQ8Ba7J6j+AvwDG6qLKPzCH7dyTeuw\u002fAJoSXa8i6T9EMqLHHYjrPzS508spTe0\u002fTNO5lV816D84DSDccUztP8CmCiU1C+4\u002f8Ca4rTU47D\u002fwJritNTjsP5A9rt+6Ldg\u002f7ByuUdWk3D94MIyNTR\u002ftP2y3tfxZGOM\u002fVH8EMgHO6j8EqmqlIvvsP4zEdj8Ryuw\u002fmFHf0OjQ6j+YNZRKFOfqP7zI7kSt9+k\u002feOhFlufY6T\u002fUrLKWpUvoP1iJJ0\u002fK9O0\u002fmFbvzk\u002fd7T\u002f008Au1DztP5wGpSP\u002fFeE\u002fmFHf0OjQ6j\u002fEutJKpmXsP3RZD5eLfeQ\u002fVDdhhs833D\u002fUT4ssfiflPxSlY3GmDO0\u002ftOfTFzaf6z9EDcEWps7lP6guztuyCuE\u002fiD\u002fdY6mb7T\u002fEGrOTyR7nPzywEiE5Euc\u002fVGHwVWBS7T94MIyNTR\u002ftP9DR7CBlO+0\u002feDCMjU0f7T\u002fs1l2AwvLrP+RrBP1GXuQ\u002fwCkRNIhp7T8AlnAQim3qP8C97xWact8\u002fPLASITkS5z+MxHY\u002fEcrsP7ikL6KJ8O0\u002fBIIpYote5j80yAj6ReDsP1jCX2IRLeg\u002fOOB5Weqo5z9UfwQyAc7qP\u002fQCoRsJjuw\u002foAeUHOTT6D\u002fQNXTVKh3oP3QRazjtZe0\u002faNPaFRuT7T\u002fkSyFMbHLmPxAS6OHDyug\u002f9JoiWcEz5D+oawkYAO\u002fqP+wNMLVV0+s\u002fxL74Mjjz6z9INsdpmaXrP6w7+AzMNes\u002f\u002fHCmx0+o6z946EWW59jpP0TADg1L+Ow\u002fFHZtqKeQ6j946EWW59jpP+ScuWmjEe0\u002fdPX1In9w6j9w1O3T8V3pP5hR39Do0Oo\u002feDCMjU0f7T+gvHj6uu7tP\u002fxwpsdPqOs\u002fWIknT8r07T94pKENoiztPxCoB+yX9us\u002fxL74Mjjz6z\u002fEutJKpmXsP\u002fi3iW60+Os\u002fRMAODUv47D+YNZRKFOfqP9xdV4VAo+g\u002frDv4DMw16z\u002fUmPmCA3vpP+RLIUxscuY\u002fnEDBci5p2T+UG4FZZBjrP3QRazjtZe0\u002fiD\u002fdY6mb7T\u002fgUGaIyFXoP9SsspalS+g\u002fFKVjcaYM7T8cm\u002fbPicbsP9w33ObGI+U\u002f3EBGu\u002fbD5T9om099oHTbP7Ac872HBOo\u002f3EBGu\u002fbD5T\u002fAdWTKQWTsP4REyDK3Q+w\u002fNKQ3hHVD4D9wT2bEj+HpPzQtmUN\u002fkOk\u002fEMZIZK4M7j+059MXNp\u002frP5g1lEoU5+o\u002f8Is95amr4z8s1ZyB\u002fWvlP1h6cRW7HO4\u002f0FkBCs3C7T\u002fQWQEKzcLtPyhkikJtaOY\u002fqGrgMOu57D9kE6rETRToP6hKQtIDkuc\u002feKShDaIs7T+wAuLNxt7tP3SKr9jRGtQ\u002fdFkPl4t95D\u002fEvvgyOPPrP\u002fi3iW60+Os\u002fkI\u002fU+EGK7D+Au5y0JlXtP3gwjI1NH+0\u002f9AnrcEZk3T9YenEVuxzuP6AGQzWKQ+g\u002fkI\u002fU+EGK7D+IP91jqZvtP9xdV4VAo+g\u002fvHgYt5sw6D9Y7MWaySXkP9DR7CBlO+0\u002fyPgZIIQl6z\u002fMqOOY77ncP5CUGuE9Vek\u002fgL62X2wQ6z8wzfItnBzlP+iN82L5XOo\u002foAZDNYpD6D8cm\u002fbPicbsP7wOh042uOs\u002f2PF8n8ya6D8oBulQzVLkP6hKQtIDkuc\u002fzKjjmO+53D94SuGznofnPzS508spTe0\u002frDv4DMw16z909fUif3DqP5hW785P3e0\u002fYNJuCXk86z8wQpPK2vfYP7wOh042uOs\u002frLv+MrQM3D\u002fYg+ZZa5PpP1Rh8FVgUu0\u002fFCHdP+rs4T8YkbSOrWnmP1Rh8FVgUu0\u002fxLrSSqZl7D\u002fojfNi+VzqPzywEiE5Euc\u002frDv4DMw16z8cUcpY+WfmP9DqJ7JKvOs\u002fmDWUShTn6j8QgqX7+zHsP0hkmQrRdOw\u002fpPHzVN\u002fM6z9o7m2zqpzlPxTjRLmjk+w\u002fZMlTqpFI7D8QEujhw8roP2BeveKfsec\u002f0NHsIGU77T+oauAw67nsP6Tx81TfzOs\u002fUG3\u002ffM3q4D+MxHY\u002fEcrsPzywEiE5Euc\u002fjMR2PxHK7D8cm\u002fbPicbsP1QMCEbI+uU\u002f+LR5WJij5z90WQ+Xi33kPxytowwAEuc\u002fUKvwfnBH5j\u002fEvvgyOPPrP6xQUCYemes\u002fNLnTyylN7T9I7vVAmiPjP0g2x2mZpes\u002fUFT+phsf2j\u002fcuODrc+rpP9RPiyx+J+U\u002fRDKixx2I6z+4pC+iifDtP1yBiOk8tuc\u002frFBQJh6Z6z\u002fUPK38ouXrP6guztuyCuE\u002fSGSZCtF07D94kLmDkfvrP2DSbgl5POs\u002feHRC9IU85j9IZJkK0XTsP4REyDK3Q+w\u002fHJv2z4nG7D9cgYjpPLbnP5z1TtS+dOI\u002f4FBmiMhV6D+Q0JXjRlzqPwDYB4ZpXek\u002fMM3yLZwc5T+UG4FZZBjrP9SUPAWuyeo\u002f9Hsks7Jz6z9g0m4JeTzrP5hW785P3e0\u002fdNX5C3x56z\u002fojfNi+VzqPzywEiE5Euc\u002fmFHf0OjQ6j8491LrBXTqP2AGwd4ddus\u002fFCHdP+rs4T+UG4FZZBjrPwSCKWKLXuY\u002frFBQJh6Z6z\u002fkSyFMbHLmPxAS6OHDyug\u002f0DV01Sod6D+YJsMgeB3uP1iiwLcEYuU\u002f+N7KSybh6T8cUcpY+WfmP\u002fi2VcRHEuo\u002f7I3B1XKs6j8UpWNxpgztPxQlf8Xnptc\u002f7ByuUdWk3D+MJy7CEmjqPxyb9s+Jxuw\u002fiD\u002fdY6mb7T+UwFVGdY7sP+yNwdVyrOo\u002fLB+GOiVn4D+YVu\u002fOT93tPxi1xU73kOc\u002frFBQJh6Z6z9UYfBVYFLtP0SFMEcB5+s\u002fOA0g3HFM7T+gpyzpzCfiP\u002fCwfDUVKeA\u002foLx4+rru7T\u002fQWQEKzcLtP2A+tNQy\u002f+Y\u002fxL74Mjjz6z+4iolyaXjrP9jxfJ\u002fMmug\u002f0FkBCs3C7T8wNo99KT\u002fkPwhcnb6DzOs\u002fRIUwRwHn6z\u002fQ6ieySrzrP2ytNYE4zeU\u002f2IPmWWuT6T9EDcEWps7lP\u002fROs9kOXus\u002frDv4DMw16z94pKENoiztPxxefrb4nOE\u002fiD\u002fdY6mb7T\u002f4tHlYmKPnP5hW785P3e0\u002flBuBWWQY6z949js1DP7pPwSqaqUi++w\u002fCFydvoPM6z+Q0JXjRlzqP9BZAQrNwu0\u002fkNCV40Zc6j+oSkLSA5LnPzgNINxxTO0\u002fANgHhmld6T+YVu\u002fOT93tP8jgpV0sMOQ\u002fxJ7trfyN4z+YJsMgeB3uP9y44Otz6uk\u002fpPHzVN\u002fM6z\u002fwpecXciHtPwSqaqUi++w\u002f0Oonskq86z\u002f0V0cO8MnoP\u002fRXRw7wyeg\u002f5EshTGxy5j8Qq3PxBjroP\u002fxwpsdPqOs\u002fqHeDXgwI5z8wzfItnBzlP5wGpSP\u002fFeE\u002fRDKixx2I6z+YnCGWnvXmP+zWXYDC8us\u002foLx4+rru7T84DSDccUztPxCrc\u002fEGOug\u002feDCMjU0f7T9YiSdPyvTtP2Dr774WVOk\u002fWCmhUzvl7D\u002fQNXTVKh3oP6w7+AzMNes\u002feJC5g5H76z9st7X8WRjjPxytowwAEuc\u002f+N7KSybh6T+UG4FZZBjrP9BZAQrNwu0\u002fiMenhzhV6j9I7vVAmiPjP9SY+YIDe+k\u002fWOvvuw1L7D8cqgB8VyjtP\u002fi3iW60+Os\u002fgLuctCZV7T8kE7D+UTzdP1Rh8FVgUu0\u002f8GIAY4k\u002f4z8EqmqlIvvsP5CV+Cx1rec\u002fePY7NQz+6T9Y6++7DUvsP9iD5llrk+k\u002fbK01gTjN5T\u002f0TrPZDl7rP4REyDK3Q+w\u002fRMAODUv47D+AvrZfbBDrP6hrCRgA7+o\u002fFHZtqKeQ6j8stTq3OY\u002fmP4zEdj8Ryuw\u002feOhFlufY6T\u002fUlDwFrsnqP9DR7CBlO+0\u002fwHVkykFk7D9YiSdPyvTtPwSCKWKLXuY\u002fvMjuRK336T9o7m2zqpzlP+jQ20rs0+o\u002feDCMjU0f7T+sO\u002fgMzDXrP1jr77sNS+w\u002fqGsJGADv6j9EwA4NS\u002fjsP1h6cRW7HO4\u002fEO0Txgrv5D\u002fwpecXciHtP8S++DI48+s\u002fwHVkykFk7D88sBIhORLnPwSCKWKLXuY\u002fHKoAfFco7T80udPLKU3tP6AHlBzk0+g\u002fkI\u002fU+EGK7D\u002fwsHw1FSngP\u002fROs9kOXus\u002foDSwlX\u002fF5D+0QxGG1W7ZP5CUGuE9Vek\u002f0Lnr313F4T+QHRvwrrHqP2AGwd4ddus\u002fdFkPl4t95D\u002fwpecXciHtPzxVht53We0\u002fwHVkykFk7D8UJX\u002fF56bXP2Dr774WVOk\u002fNKQ3hHVD4D8stTq3OY\u002fmP2ytNYE4zeU\u002fmCbDIHgd7j+gNLCVf8XkPwSCKWKLXuY\u002fpCzusHFl6z\u002f0eySzsnPrP9SUPAWuyeo\u002f3Ljg63Pq6T+YUd\u002fQ6NDqPxTjRLmjk+w\u002fnAalI\u002f8V4T9Ut7hK+driP5gu4NBCB+c\u002fRMAODUv47D80yAj6ReDsP4C+tl9sEOs\u002f9Hsks7Jz6z9gBsHeHXbrP2TJU6qRSOw\u002fkI\u002fU+EGK7D8cUcpY+WfmP+yNwdVyrOo\u002fjMR2PxHK7D+sdpZSWyHpP3TV+Qt8ees\u002f8Is95amr4z\u002fwpecXciHtPyDgVN4Y\u002fus\u002fMDcTnmSE6T94SuGznofnP1Rh8FVgUu0\u002fSO71QJoj4z8491LrBXTqP2Dr774WVOk\u002fIBQuW\u002fDh4T+QHRvwrrHqP1gpoVM75ew\u002fWHpxFbsc7j886V0GlELhP3hK4bOeh+c\u002fiMenhzhV6j8oZIpCbWjmPzTICPpF4Ow\u002frHaWUlsh6T\u002fkSyFMbHLmP+RLIUxscuY\u002ftOfTFzaf6z84DSDccUztP3joRZbn2Ok\u002frDv4DMw16z9srTWBOM3lP1R\u002fBDIBzuo\u002fhETIMrdD7D+gvHj6uu7tPxxRylj5Z+Y\u002fpKsDUjNw1j9I7vVAmiPjP\u002fSaIlnBM+Q\u002fBIIpYote5j+YM1cNwpjtP3gwjI1NH+0\u002fVGHwVWBS7T8YkbSOrWnmP9SUPAWuyeo\u002flMBVRnWO7D\u002fgUGaIyFXoP0zTuZVfNeg\u002f9AKhGwmO7D+MJy7CEmjqP\u002fjeyksm4ek\u002fjCcuwhJo6j+Qj9T4QYrsP5hW785P3e0\u002fOA0g3HFM7T8wJGCm1fjWP8SyjY8VI+w\u002f8KXnF3Ih7T8oBulQzVLkPxDtE8YK7+Q\u002fhETIMrdD7D+gB5Qc5NPoP+zWXYDC8us\u002flP2WsIN17D8U40S5o5PsP+RLIUxscuY\u002fZMlTqpFI7D949js1DP7pP\u002fi3iW60+Os\u002f+LR5WJij5z+MJy7CEmjqP3AAPWuOv+w\u002fRFQBnycu5T\u002fY5FY9o5jmP8S60kqmZew\u002fkI\u002fU+EGK7D+sO\u002fgMzDXrPzCH7dyTeuw\u002f0NbxmVBd7D84Ori1PU7gP6AHlBzk0+g\u002f0NHsIGU77T\u002fcXVeFQKPoPzgNINxxTO0\u002fEIKl+\u002fsx7D\u002fcQEa79sPlPygUOwzY794\u002fIPyOkbsp2j\u002fwpecXciHtP\u002fCl5xdyIe0\u002fBKpqpSL77D9Ywl9iES3oP5gu4NBCB+c\u002fWHpxFbsc7j9INsdpmaXrP+RLIUxscuY\u002fkJQa4T1V6T+oawkYAO\u002fqP\u002fCl5xdyIe0\u002feErhs56H5z8EXK5VrRrpP2Dr774WVOk\u002fkJX4LHWt5z\u002f4t4lutPjrP9RPiyx+J+U\u002fpEXb8lUJ6j9QcpMYkKraP0RUAZ8nLuU\u002f0NHsIGU77T9EwA4NS\u002fjsP4zEdj8Ryuw\u002f8GIAY4k\u002f4z\u002fcQEa79sPlP\u002fTTwC7UPO0\u002fxI6cw3Fp4j9INsdpmaXrP6h3g14MCOc\u002flP2WsIN17D\u002fUPK38ouXrP9DR7CBlO+0\u002fkI\u002fU+EGK7D\u002fkJU0l85rpP3AAPWuOv+w\u002fYNJuCXk86z\u002fcXVeFQKPoPzgNINxxTO0\u002fWIknT8r07T8AlnAQim3qP3joRZbn2Ok\u002f+LZVxEcS6j+sUFAmHpnrPwCaEl2vIuk\u002fWHpxFbsc7j88VYbed1ntP0BTNPm+qdQ\u002f5EshTGxy5j8QgqX7+zHsP4REyDK3Q+w\u002fgHyo9vhI7D+059MXNp\u002frP9jxfJ\u002fMmug\u002f8KXnF3Ih7T901fkLfHnrP9SUPAWuyeo\u002fBIIpYote5j9EwA4NS\u002fjsPzTICPpF4Ow\u002f4C43utMi7j\u002fwYgBjiT\u002fjP\u002fQCoRsJjuw\u002foAZDNYpD6D9w1O3T8V3pPzDN8i2cHOU\u002foIAvmPAC3j8wNxOeZITpP6AGQzWKQ+g\u002f6NDbSuzT6j8EHppEZRDgP5hR39Do0Oo\u002fkI\u002fU+EGK7D+cBqUj\u002fxXhP\u002fiT4PYv9us\u002fWCmhUzvl7D94kLmDkfvrP0SFMEcB5+s\u002feJC5g5H76z946EWW59jpPzg6uLU9TuA\u002fAErym7uW7T+8DodONrjrP4wnLsISaOo\u002fEBLo4cPK6D+8yO5ErffpP6C8ePq67u0\u002fGLXFTveQ5z\u002fsm4NBiCboPzjgeVnqqOc\u002f6I3zYvlc6j9EVAGfJy7lP\u002fAmuK01OOw\u002fODq4tT1O4D+Me0O8RPnqP3B1QKDdJ+c\u002fmDNXDcKY7T9Ut7hK+driP5gmwyB4He4\u002fBIriQrE04z+su\u002f4ytAzcP8ApETSIae0\u002fLNWcgf1r5T+4pC+iifDtP8AcpvQ\u002fmOA\u002f6IYliWWX6T\u002fEutJKpmXsP4hToMRxkd0\u002flP2WsIN17D+QPa7fui3YP3QRazjtZe0\u002f7A0wtVXT6z\u002fQdnwZOMDoP8S60kqmZew\u002fHJv2z4nG7D\u002fcuODrc+rpP2DSbgl5POs\u002fYAbB3h126z8AlnAQim3qPyDgVN4Y\u002fus\u002fmDWUShTn6j\u002fwpecXciHtP9DR7CBlO+0\u002fhETIMrdD7D8Qq3PxBjroPzDN8i2cHOU\u002frPkBkVuhxD9YenEVuxzuPwhcnb6DzOs\u002fuC0kyreq6D\u002fM56rgY9HjP+ybg0GIJug\u002fnAalI\u002f8V4T\u002fEnu2t\u002fI3jP7Ac872HBOo\u002foCWEkDYP5T\u002fojfNi+VzqPxyb9s+Jxuw\u002f1Jj5ggN76T+4r8yqHoLjP4gpAOV27+0\u002fvHgYt5sw6D\u002f43spLJuHpP7Tn0xc2n+s\u002fHJv2z4nG7D+AfKj2+EjsP5wGpSP\u002fFeE\u002fRGrQIN0D5T\u002fQWQEKzcLtPzS508spTe0\u002fnPVO1L504j\u002fAve8VmnLfP5gJJ22MkeU\u002f1L+5E34E5j\u002foLIrRx6vnP6Qs7rBxZes\u002f9NPALtQ87T+4LSTKt6roPxCwNtxV7u0\u002f7JuDQYgm6D+Au5y0JlXtP4zEdj8Ryuw\u002fyPgZIIQl6z+w4+4IPsbtP9SY+YIDe+k\u002fdNX5C3x56z8QgqX7+zHsP4REyDK3Q+w\u002foAeUHOTT6D\u002fUPK38ouXrPxCwNtxV7u0\u002foAZDNYpD6D+sO\u002fgMzDXrP4zEdj8Ryuw\u002fuC0kyreq6D8UpWNxpgztPxxRylj5Z+Y\u002fSGSZCtF07D88fLb4i4\u002frPzQtmUN\u002fkOk\u002fmJwhlp715j9gBsHeHXbrP\u002fAmuK01OOw\u002fqEpC0gOS5z\u002fEvvgyOPPrP+zWXYDC8us\u002fLD+219PK6z9EMqLHHYjrP5CP1PhBiuw\u002f\u002fHCmx0+o6z+AWNCswuPkP\u002fi3iW60+Os\u002f7JuDQYgm6D+AvrZfbBDrPzydNt2TY+w\u002fANgHhmld6T\u002fEGrOTyR7nPzywEiE5Euc\u002fqKwMZvP34j+Qj9T4QYrsP+ScuWmjEe0\u002f1JQ8Ba7J6j+orAxm8\u002ffiP\u002fzGIvsgmeo\u002fmFbvzk\u002fd7T+YM1cNwpjtPwCaEl2vIuk\u002fBKpqpSL77D+Me0O8RPnqP\u002fi0eViYo+c\u002fPFWG3ndZ7T\u002fQ0ewgZTvtPxAS6OHDyug\u002f+N7KSybh6T\u002fwpecXciHtPzTICPpF4Ow\u002fjMR2PxHK7D9UYfBVYFLtPzgNINxxTO0\u002flMBVRnWO7D8cUcpY+WfmPyDgVN4Y\u002fus\u002fmFHf0OjQ6j\u002fUT4ssfiflP8S++DI48+s\u002fjCcuwhJo6j9UN2GGzzfcP3DU7dPxXek\u002fJBOw\u002flE83T9o09oVG5PtP0TADg1L+Ow\u002f1E+LLH4n5T\u002fQdnwZOMDoP5hR39Do0Oo\u002fiGChdBLD5T\u002fojfNi+VzqP5TAVUZ1juw\u002f+LeJbrT46z\u002fEvvgyOPPrPxyqAHxXKO0\u002fiD\u002fdY6mb7T\u002fojfNi+VzqP6C8ePq67u0\u002f9E6z2Q5e6z9of07FL5LhP9iD5llrk+k\u002fCFydvoPM6z\u002fQ1vGZUF3sP9RPiyx+J+U\u002fyBJarLHp4j\u002fQNXTVKh3oP9DW8ZlQXew\u002fwJ3cGpay6D9YosC3BGLlPxxRylj5Z+Y\u002f+JPg9i\u002f26z\u002fkJU0l85rpP\u002fTTwC7UPO0\u002f8KXnF3Ih7T+ERMgyt0PsP0ju9UCaI+M\u002fyBJarLHp4j+Q0JXjRlzqP\u002fROs9kOXus\u002faPMDGL7m4z80udPLKU3tP0QyoscdiOs\u002fqGrgMOu57D+UwFVGdY7sP4Aeyu8XaeE\u002fGLXFTveQ5z\u002fUmPmCA3vpPxyb9s+Jxuw\u002f+N7KSybh6T+YNZRKFOfqP4zEdj8Ryuw\u002f8NBdjtoZ3j+YM1cNwpjtPxTjRLmjk+w\u002fkI\u002fU+EGK7D\u002f43spLJuHpP0zTuZVfNeg\u002faOUMPdgl7D8QxkhkrgzuP6xQUCYemes\u002f0FkBCs3C7T+kRdvyVQnqPzCH7dyTeuw\u002fHFHKWPln5j9Y\u002fpyBT9rKP6Tx81TfzOs\u002fiD\u002fdY6mb7T8QsDbcVe7tP3hK4bOeh+c\u002fHFHKWPln5j9EhTBHAefrP4DYkFHhveU\u002f0Lnr313F4T9AUzT5vqnUPwSqaqUi++w\u002fmFbvzk\u002fd7T+8DodONrjrP+wNMLVV0+s\u002fZMlTqpFI7D+059MXNp\u002frP8CmCiU1C+4\u002fjMR2PxHK7D94SuGznofnP4jHp4c4Veo\u002fpCzusHFl6z9gBsHeHXbrP1Rh8FVgUu0\u002fnAalI\u002f8V4T84DSDccUztP5gmwyB4He4\u002fGLXFTveQ5z+059MXNp\u002frP2jlDD3YJew\u002flMBVRnWO7D9Qq\u002fB+cEfmP6AGQzWKQ+g\u002fkI\u002fU+EGK7D94MIyNTR\u002ftP7Tn0xc2n+s\u002fiGChdBLD5T80udPLKU3tP+wNMLVV0+s\u002fbIhz2sHu5j\u002fwYgBjiT\u002fjP3AAPWuOv+w\u002fRA3BFqbO5T9ctY5sPPfrP9DR7CBlO+0\u002fHFHKWPln5j+Ymm5wlcDeP9DR7CBlO+0\u002fOPdS6wV06j9om099oHTbP+iN82L5XOo\u002fwCkRNIhp7T+MJy7CEmjqP9SY+YIDe+k\u002feOhFlufY6T9YiSdPyvTtP9DR7CBlO+0\u002fYD601DL\u002f5j9Y7MWaySXkP2BeveKfsec\u002f+LR5WJij5z\u002fcQEa79sPlP9Q8rfyi5es\u002fUKvwfnBH5j+YUd\u002fQ6NDqP\u002fi0eViYo+c\u002f5Jy5aaMR7T+gBkM1ikPoP0g2x2mZpes\u002f+Bi9L3ZW6j946EWW59jpP3iQuYOR++s\u002fBFyuVa0a6T90EWs47WXtPxyb9s+Jxuw\u002fBKpqpSL77D\u002f43spLJuHpP4REyDK3Q+w\u002fAErym7uW7T\u002fIZUWhnMDtPwCaEl2vIuk\u002fdNX5C3x56z+gpyzpzCfiP9jOZcG9A94\u002fHKoAfFco7T+U\u002fZawg3XsP4gpAOV27+0\u002fPLASITkS5z\u002f43spLJuHpP\u002fCl5xdyIe0\u002fHJv2z4nG7D8craMMABLnP+QlTSXzmuk\u002f7A0wtVXT6z\u002fwiz3lqavjP8Cd3BqWsug\u002fYF694p+x5z88sBIhORLnP6RISOvNi+Q\u002fHJv2z4nG7D9w1O3T8V3pP8iP+fzXKus\u002fPFQBnycu5T\u002fsjfNi+VzqP2DubbOqnOU\u002fTMAODUv47D9A7vVAmiPjP\u002fi3iW60+Os\u002faAbB3h126z9kyVOqkUjsP7jn0xc2n+s\u002f4NDbSuzT6j\u002fENXTVKh3oPwgh3T\u002fq7OE\u002f2NHsIGU77T+UB5Qc5NPoP7gC4s3G3u0\u002f8Enym7uW7T\u002fs08Au1DztPyS508spTe0\u002ffMR2PxHK7D+0UFAmHpnrP6hKQtIDkuc\u002faM2SAFpB1T8YqAfsl\u002fbrP2gGwd4ddus\u002fALV5WJij5z+459MXNp\u002frP\u002fCT4PYv9us\u002fuPC1nQDH3z9opKENoiztP6DN2KmzQ+I\u002fnCzusHFl6z+crAxm8\u002ffiP2wTqsRNFOg\u002fgDCMjU0f7T+wKRE0iGntPxBcnb6DzOs\u002foDNXDcKY7T9opKENoiztPzywEiE5Euc\u002fgDCMjU0f7T\u002f4pecXciHtP8hZAQrNwu0\u002fnKwMZvP34j+4eBi3mzDoP9TkVj2jmOY\u002fTDKixx2I6z9MN2GGzzfcP7Q7+AzMNes\u002fTJXnAHBL0j+YlBrhPVXpP1Dr77sNS+w\u002fyFkBCs3C7T+4HPO9hwTqP5iP1PhBiuw\u002fLB+GOiVn4D\u002fApC+iifDtP7RQUCYemes\u002fzL74Mjjz6z\u002fs08Au1DztPwRT+D8SOOI\u002f8LZVxEcS6j9UXr3in7HnP6i8ePq67u0\u002fGBLo4cPK6D\u002f4t4lutPjrP2AAPWuOv+w\u002fjMenhzhV6j9s1O3T8V3pP8znquBj0eM\u002f8Enym7uW7T\u002f03spLJuHpP7zgpV0sMOQ\u002fGKtz8QY66D+AMIyNTR\u002ftP\u002fTGIvsgmeo\u002fYHpxFbsc7j+oSkLSA5LnP3BZD5eLfeQ\u002fiB0b8K6x6j8km\u002fbPicbsP2CtNYE4zeU\u002feCxWVI0L6j9MwA4NS\u002fjsPySlY3GmDO0\u002f6Ca4rTU47D+cCSdtjJHlPwjGSGSuDO4\u002fdIqv2NEa1D9s1fkLfHnrP9B1ZMpBZOw\u002f2Ljg63Pq6T+0O\u002fgMzDXrP5RgoXQSw+U\u002fTMAODUv47D\u002fgQEa79sPlP5QHlBzk0+g\u002fXGHwVWBS7T\u002f03spLJuHpP4xEyDK3Q+w\u002fcNPaFRuT7T\u002fMAnLZcoPjP5SVdIjBKOk\u002fkCkA5Xbv7T+ASuGznofnPxioB+yX9us\u002fLDaPfSk\u002f5D+AMIyNTR\u002ftPygZ6ECdjeM\u002fjMenhzhV6j\u002f8nab868TcP3zQRqFtz+I\u002f2NHsIGU77T\u002fclDwFrsnqP0STzfqYQOs\u002fjMenhzhV6j\u002f01l2AwvLrP7CKiXJpeOs\u002fxDV01Sod6D\u002fM56rgY9HjPzDpXQaUQuE\u002fCCV\u002fxeem1z\u002fENXTVKh3oPySb9s+Jxuw\u002f2NbxmVBd7D8QXn62+JzhP\u002fil5xdyIe0\u002fQO71QJoj4z8QXJ2+g8zrP+DQXY7aGd4\u002fYIhz2sHu5j8MXK5VrRrpPxBcnb6DzOs\u002fnP2WsIN17D\u002fIWQEKzcLtP9B1ZMpBZOw\u002fzL74Mjjz6z9oiSdPyvTtP+BrBP1GXuQ\u002fnP2WsIN17D+oU9V15v3qPyS508spTe0\u002f4CVNJfOa6T\u002f4pecXciHtP0A3YYbPN9w\u002f4GsE\u002fUZe5D8UE7D+UTzdPyRRylj5Z+Y\u002f2NHsIGU77T84WbCCCPDoP2zU7dPxXek\u002fuOfTFzaf6z+4auAw67nsP1xh8FVgUu0\u002f4EBGu\u002fbD5T8Y\u002fI6RuynaP8hZAQrNwu0\u002fMPdS6wV06j\u002fEX\u002fNXljfhP4wbgVlkGOs\u002fzAJy2XKD4z\u002fgawT9Rl7kP5zx81TfzOs\u002foAalI\u002f8V4T+oSkLSA5LnP\u002fi3iW60+Os\u002fvJ3cGpay6D+Mx6eHOFXqP3zEdj8Ryuw\u002ftDv4DMw16z+0UFAmHpnrP4zHp4c4Veo\u002ftHaWUlsh6T9s1O3T8V3pP8y++DI48+s\u002f1ORWPaOY5j8YgqX7+zHsP+TxfJ\u002fMmug\u002fSP4FJ5r14D+wvHj6uu7tP4h8qPb4SOw\u002fcNPaFRuT7T\u002fYdnwZOMDoP3gsVlSNC+o\u002f\u002fKlqpSL77D+MUd\u002fQ6NDqPzxUAZ8nLuU\u002f\u002fKlqpSL77D\u002fEnu2t\u002fI3jP9yUPAWuyeo\u002fmJQa4T1V6T+wKRE0iGntP1jSbgl5POs\u002f\u002fKlqpSL77D+4eBi3mzDoPxioB+yX9us\u002fZH8EMgHO6j9kyVOqkUjsP2zU7dPxXek\u002fuALizcbe7T\u002f0DmqUOcbjP8y++DI48+s\u002f9A5qlDnG4z8YqAfsl\u002fbrP4h8qPb4SOw\u002f7I3zYvlc6j+459MXNp\u002frPzywEiE5Euc\u002f1LrSSqZl7D+UlXSIwSjpP6BrCRgA7+o\u002fjMenhzhV6j9UgYjpPLbnP6C7\u002fjK0DNw\u002fLFWG3ndZ7T+A6EWW59jpP3wRazjtZe0\u002f2HZ8GTjA6D9gAD1rjr\u002fsPwRmokTB2+A\u002f"},"xbins":{"end":2.0,"size":0.05,"start":0},"type":"histogram"}],                        {"template":{"data":{"histogram2dcontour":[{"type":"histogram2dcontour","colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"colorscale":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]]}],"choropleth":[{"type":"choropleth","colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}],"histogram2d":[{"type":"histogram2d","colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"colorscale":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]]}],"heatmap":[{"type":"heatmap","colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"colorscale":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]]}],"contourcarpet":[{"type":"contourcarpet","colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}],"contour":[{"type":"contour","colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"colorscale":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]]}],"surface":[{"type":"surface","colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"colorscale":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]]}],"mesh3d":[{"type":"mesh3d","colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}],"scatter":[{"fillpattern":{"fillmode":"overlay","size":10,"solidity":0.2},"type":"scatter"}],"parcoords":[{"type":"parcoords","line":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"scatterpolargl":[{"type":"scatterpolargl","marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"bar":[{"error_x":{"color":"#2a3f5f"},"error_y":{"color":"#2a3f5f"},"marker":{"line":{"color":"#E5ECF6","width":0.5},"pattern":{"fillmode":"overlay","size":10,"solidity":0.2}},"type":"bar"}],"scattergeo":[{"type":"scattergeo","marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"scatterpolar":[{"type":"scatterpolar","marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"histogram":[{"marker":{"pattern":{"fillmode":"overlay","size":10,"solidity":0.2}},"type":"histogram"}],"scattergl":[{"type":"scattergl","marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"scatter3d":[{"type":"scatter3d","line":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}},"marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"scattermap":[{"type":"scattermap","marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"scattermapbox":[{"type":"scattermapbox","marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"scatterternary":[{"type":"scatterternary","marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"scattercarpet":[{"type":"scattercarpet","marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}}}],"carpet":[{"aaxis":{"endlinecolor":"#2a3f5f","gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","minorgridcolor":"white","startlinecolor":"#2a3f5f"},"baxis":{"endlinecolor":"#2a3f5f","gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","minorgridcolor":"white","startlinecolor":"#2a3f5f"},"type":"carpet"}],"table":[{"cells":{"fill":{"color":"#EBF0F8"},"line":{"color":"white"}},"header":{"fill":{"color":"#C8D4E3"},"line":{"color":"white"}},"type":"table"}],"barpolar":[{"marker":{"line":{"color":"#E5ECF6","width":0.5},"pattern":{"fillmode":"overlay","size":10,"solidity":0.2}},"type":"barpolar"}],"pie":[{"automargin":true,"type":"pie"}]},"layout":{"autotypenumbers":"strict","colorway":["#636efa","#EF553B","#00cc96","#ab63fa","#FFA15A","#19d3f3","#FF6692","#B6E880","#FF97FF","#FECB52"],"font":{"color":"#2a3f5f"},"hovermode":"closest","hoverlabel":{"align":"left"},"paper_bgcolor":"white","plot_bgcolor":"#E5ECF6","polar":{"bgcolor":"#E5ECF6","angularaxis":{"gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","ticks":""},"radialaxis":{"gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","ticks":""}},"ternary":{"bgcolor":"#E5ECF6","aaxis":{"gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","ticks":""},"baxis":{"gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","ticks":""},"caxis":{"gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","ticks":""}},"coloraxis":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}},"colorscale":{"sequential":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]],"sequentialminus":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]],"diverging":[[0,"#8e0152"],[0.1,"#c51b7d"],[0.2,"#de77ae"],[0.3,"#f1b6da"],[0.4,"#fde0ef"],[0.5,"#f7f7f7"],[0.6,"#e6f5d0"],[0.7,"#b8e186"],[0.8,"#7fbc41"],[0.9,"#4d9221"],[1,"#276419"]]},"xaxis":{"gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","ticks":"","title":{"standoff":15},"zerolinecolor":"white","automargin":true,"zerolinewidth":2},"yaxis":{"gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","ticks":"","title":{"standoff":15},"zerolinecolor":"white","automargin":true,"zerolinewidth":2},"scene":{"xaxis":{"backgroundcolor":"#E5ECF6","gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","showbackground":true,"ticks":"","zerolinecolor":"white","gridwidth":2},"yaxis":{"backgroundcolor":"#E5ECF6","gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","showbackground":true,"ticks":"","zerolinecolor":"white","gridwidth":2},"zaxis":{"backgroundcolor":"#E5ECF6","gridcolor":"white","linecolor":"white","showbackground":true,"ticks":"","zerolinecolor":"white","gridwidth":2}},"shapedefaults":{"line":{"color":"#2a3f5f"}},"annotationdefaults":{"arrowcolor":"#2a3f5f","arrowhead":0,"arrowwidth":1},"geo":{"bgcolor":"white","landcolor":"#E5ECF6","subunitcolor":"white","showland":true,"showlakes":true,"lakecolor":"white"},"title":{"x":0.05},"mapbox":{"style":"light"}}},"shapes":[{"line":{"color":"#A78BFA","dash":"dot","width":2.5},"type":"line","x0":0.7927680710452703,"x1":0.7927680710452703,"xref":"x","y0":0,"y1":1,"yref":"y domain"}],"annotations":[{"font":{"color":"#A78BFA","size":12},"showarrow":false,"text":"Average treatment effect = +0.793 patents\u002ffirm","x":0.7927680710452703,"y":1.02,"yanchor":"bottom","yref":"paper"}],"xaxis":{"title":{"text":"Predicted patents if customer minus predicted if not, per firm","font":{"color":"rgba(150,150,150,0.7)"}},"tickfont":{"color":"rgba(150,150,150,0.7)"},"showgrid":true,"gridcolor":"rgba(150,150,150,0.15)","zeroline":false,"linecolor":"rgba(150,150,150,0.7)"},"yaxis":{"title":{"text":"Number of firms","font":{"color":"rgba(150,150,150,0.7)"}},"tickfont":{"color":"rgba(150,150,150,0.7)"},"showgrid":true,"gridcolor":"rgba(150,150,150,0.15)","zeroline":false,"linecolor":"rgba(150,150,150,0.7)"},"font":{"family":"Geist, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif","size":13,"color":"#888"},"margin":{"t":30,"r":20,"b":50,"l":60},"legend":{"orientation":"h","yanchor":"bottom","y":1.02,"xanchor":"right","x":1,"bgcolor":"rgba(0,0,0,0)"},"hoverlabel":{"font":{"color":"#F0EEE8","family":"Geist"},"bgcolor":"#161614"},"paper_bgcolor":"rgba(0,0,0,0)","plot_bgcolor":"rgba(0,0,0,0)","height":380,"bargap":0.05},                        {"displayModeBar": false, "responsive": true}                    )                };            </script>        </div>
```
